requiredSurfaceCoverage.reason: Chat density and streaming boundaries need more than one comparison source.
The primary input affordance must be checked against desktop and streaming-first references.
Settings need both dense desktop organization and component primitive discipline.
The companion identity layer needs at least one agent-identity reference.
The dial is Image4-specific, but it still needs an identity/hierarchy reference.
Companion color and emotional tone need both ambient identity and desktop-local trust references.
Form behavior should combine component grammar with accessible primitive behavior.
Keyboard and focus behavior need both accessible primitive behavior and AI interaction focus boundaries.
Streaming message flow needs at least two AI chat references for append-only output and tool-result boundaries.
Companion activity boundaries need multiple checks across agent boundary, approval, and product-capability references.

references.name: Open WebUI
references.borrow: Low-noise chat density and restrained utility affordances.
references.avoid: Full workspace/admin chrome or broad platform density inside the companion panel.

references.name: Chatbox
references.borrow: Desktop composer ergonomics, local-first feel, and progressive replies.
references.avoid: Floating action clusters or generic desktop-client chrome that competes with input.

references.name: Jan
references.borrow: Local-first desktop AI posture, quiet model/runtime status, and privacy-centered client feel.
references.avoid: Generic local-model workbench chrome or provider/runtime controls inside the companion surface.

references.name: assistant-ui
references.borrow: Chat component state grammar for thread, composer, branch, and streaming affordances.
references.avoid: Library demo skin, app shell assumptions, or replacing Nexus-specific state ownership with generic component defaults.

references.name: LibreChat
references.borrow: Mature all-in-one chat product boundaries for agents, MCP/tools, presets, search, artifacts, and resumable streams.
references.avoid: ChatGPT-like skin, admin panel density, multi-user workspace chrome, or treating Nexus like a general chat platform.

references.name: Cherry Studio
references.borrow: Dense provider and settings organization through predictable sections.
references.avoid: Dashboard card stacks, provider-studio chrome, or feature density inside Image4.

references.name: AnythingLLM
references.borrow: Workspace memory, source context, and agent capability grouping with explicit boundaries.
references.avoid: Document-workspace density, enterprise dashboards, or turning companion awareness into a heavy workbench.

references.name: LobeHub / LobeChat lineage
references.borrow: Calm agent identity, conversational spacing discipline, and companion hierarchy.
references.avoid: Avatar chrome, multi-agent workforce framing, or product shell mimicry.

references.name: Vercel AI Chatbot
references.borrow: Streaming-first composition, composer priority, and tool/result boundaries.
references.avoid: Browser-page layout assumptions copied into the desktop side panel.

references.name: OpenHands
references.borrow: Coding-agent activity boundaries, observation/action/run-state separation, and explicit task progress framing.
references.avoid: Autonomous workbench chrome, code execution cockpit layouts, issue-agent workflows, or turning Nexus into a Codex-like product shell.

references.name: Cline
references.borrow: Human-in-the-loop agent activity, plan/act mode boundaries, command/output monitoring, checkpoints, and approval gates.
references.avoid: IDE extension shell, terminal/log surfaces, file diff chrome, autonomous code-agent framing, or multi-agent task board metaphors.

references.name: shadcn/ui
references.borrow: Component grammar, state discipline, form/dialog/button/tabs composition.
references.avoid: Default demo skin, card-heavy examples, or imported radius/color language.

references.name: Radix UI Primitives
references.borrow: Accessible focus behavior, controlled primitives, keyboard interaction semantics.
references.avoid: Headless abstraction churn where Nexus simple controls are already stable.
